title: Paddling Pool Repair Kit Waterproof, Hot Tub Puncture Repair Kit, Liquid PVC for Inflatable Kayak, Air Bed, Bouncy Castle, Bounce House, Hot Tub
features: Powerful Repair: The pool repair patch provides powerful repair power, effectively solving various puncture problems and repairing tears, cracks, holes, or punctures, making inflatable objects reusable and saving the cost of purchasing new products. The pool repair kit that is not easily curled is combined with professional glue to bond with the repair area, forming a durable repair layer with a good repair effect

Value for money: The paddling pool repair kit has a high cost performance ratio and is equipped with glue, a scraper, and patches. The swimming pool repair patches are colorless and transparent, suitable for various colored items, and will not affect the appearance, ensuring that the repair effect is both practical and beautiful. The metal needle design of the rubber hose can maintain sealing and is not easy to leak

Wide Range of Applications: The hot tub repair kit is suitable for bonding various materials such as TPU, EVA, ABS, PVC, etc. The inflatable kayak repair kit can repair various inflatable products, tents, waterproof clothing, and PVC plastic toys, especially suitable for repairing most inflatable items, including swimming rings, air mattresses, hot tubs, inflatable castles, and ground swimming pools

Ease of Use: Our liquid PVC is easy to operate. You just need to clean and dry the surface to be repaired first, apply hot tub puncture repair kit evenly on the surface to be repaired and the patch, then apply the patch to the area that needs to be repaired and wait for 24 hours to achieve optimal bonding strength

Considerate After-sales Service: If you are not satisfied with the effectiveness of the air bed repair patch kitor if there are any problems with the pool patch repair kits , please feel free to contact us through Amazon at any time. We will provide you with fast and worry-free exchange or refund services and meet any other assistance you may need
